titleStmt.title: SII 8.285: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 285. (A.R. No. 16 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
@ svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟaiviti
neṟiyaṉaittum taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimai maṇimuṭi cūṭi tiṅkaḷveṇkuṭait ticaikkaḷiṟeṭṭun ta
ṅku taṉikkūṭam tāneṉa viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkolturappa poruṅkatirrāḻi puvivaḷan tu
ṭaṉvara villavar riraṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar mutalikaḷ pārttivar paṇiya Eṇṇarum kaṟpam maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempon virasiṁhā
saṉattu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻāṉṉaṭikaḷḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti
kaḷ śrīIrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4.lāvatu vaṭakarai virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭu brahmateyam
tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampalaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Ūruṭait tiruttāṉtoṉṟicuramuṭaiya nāyanārkku
Iṉṉāṭu pāṭikāvalkāṇiyuṭaiya ceṉtaṉ kūttāṭuvāṉṉāna Irājarājavaṅkāramuttarayaneṉ Inṉāya
ṉāṟkkum nācciyāṟkkum tiruArttacāmappaṭi Amutupaṭikkuc caṉtirātittavaṟ cella Amutupaṭikku tiruvamutari
ci kuṟuṇikku nellup patakku ṉānāḻiyum pālamutu Irunāḻikku nellu nāṉāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukkum Uppamutukkum
miḷakamutukkum neyyamutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākkum Ilaiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum nellu Aṟunāḻiyum tiru
mañcaṉam vaippāṉukku nellu Irunāḻiyum Āka nāḷ 1.kku nellut tūṇiyāka nāḷ 3 100 6 10.kku 100 2 10.ḷa Iṉnel
lu nūṟṟirupatiṉkalamum Ivvūriṟ kaḻani ṉancainilattu Inṉāyanār tevatānattuk kārum Eḷḷum pacāṉamum
viḷainta nilattile Eṉ pāṭikāval kūli koṇṭuvarukiṟa veli Aiṅkala nellākavanta ne
llile Iṉṉāyanār tevatāṉattup pāṭikāval nellile celaviṭṭukoḷḷakkaṭa
varkaḷḷākavum nānum Eṉ vaṅśattār Uḷḷataṉaiyum cantirātittavarai Ivvamutu celut
takkaṭavomāka Ikkoyilile kal veṭṭikkuṭutteṉ Iṉṉāṭu pāṭikāval kāṇiuṭai
ya centaṉ kūttāṭuvāṉnāna Irājarājavaṅkāramuttarayaṉen . Ittaṉ mam Eṉ vaṅśattu Aḻivu cey
vār pallavaraiyaṉ cat .
Digital edition of SII 8.285 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
